description_long: This object is a classic chessboard with a square playing surface featuring a black and white checkered pattern, bordered by a thick wooden frame. The board is set up for a standard game of chess, with two sets of chess pieces—one white and one black—arranged in their starting positions. The chess pieces are detailed and appear to be made of either plastic or metal, with the white pieces having a matte finish and the black pieces a glossy, metallic sheen. The wooden border is light brown, smooth, and polished, providing a sturdy and elegant frame for the board. The playing surface is flat and even, with each square clearly defined and evenly spaced. The overall appearance is clean, professional, and suitable for both casual and competitive play in public urban spaces such as parks or plazas.
description: A classic chessboard with a black and white checkered playing surface, bordered by a polished wooden frame and set up with detailed white and black chess pieces. The board is elegant, sturdy, and visually striking.
description_view_0: The chessboard is viewed from the white side, showing the white pieces in the foreground and the black pieces in the background, with the wooden border clearly visible.
description_view_1: The board is seen from the black side, with the black pieces in the foreground and the white pieces in the background, highlighting the symmetry of the setup.
description_view_2: A side view of the chessboard, displaying both sets of pieces from the left, with the alternating squares and wooden border visible.
description_view_3: The board is viewed from the right side, showing the arrangement of both sets of pieces and the clean lines of the checkered pattern.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface features a regular 8x8 grid of alternating black and white squares, each square being perfectly square-shaped and evenly spaced. The pattern is classic and geometric, with no decorative elements or inscriptions within the grid area.
attribute_border_design: The border is a wide, smooth, light brown wooden frame with a polished finish. It is plain, with no ornamentation, inscriptions, or markings, and provides a sturdy edge around the playing area.
